chapters.title: Cold open
chapters.scriptText:
In the early hours of March 11, 2026, an employee at Stryker Corporation's Irish hub woke up to a ghost in their machine. They didn't see a notification or an incoming call. They saw a factory reset in progress.
Before they were fully awake, it was done. The phone: silent. The laptop in the next room: already dark, its fan winding down to nothing. Not crashed. Not frozen. Gone.
And simultaneously — across nearly eighty countries, on surgical tablets in Michigan, on administrator consoles in Singapore, on the personal phones of thousands of employees who never thought twice about connecting them to the company network — two hundred thousand devices were wiping themselves. A decade of work. Plans, correspondence, secrets — disappearing in real time.
No ransom note. No countdown timer. Just silence, spreading from device to device across the globe, as if a switch had been thrown somewhere in the dark.
A twenty-five billion dollar company had just been erased.
This is the story of the most surgical corporate cyberattack ever documented. A wiper attack conducted entirely without a wiper. And it begins not with a line of malicious code, but with a stolen key — and a door that should never have opened from the outside.
This story is based on the factual reporting of Krebs on Security. Full sources and technical documentation are available in the video description.

scenes.script: In the early hours of March 11, 2026, an employee at Stryker Corporation's Irish hub woke up to a ghost in their machine.

content.CONTEXT_TEXT: Irish hub employee reports anomalous device behavior.

scenes.code:
import React, { useMemo } from 'react' import { useCurrentFrame, interpolate } from 'remotion' export const AnimationComponent = () => { const frame = useCurrentFrame() const titleText = "STRYKER CORPORATION" const label1 = "LOCATION" const label2 = "INDUSTRY" const label3 = "STATUS" const tag1 = "IRELAND" const tag2 = "MEDICAL TECH" const tag3 = "COMPROMISED" const stat1 = "2026" const stat2 = "MARCH 11" const stat3 = "04:00 AM" const contextText = "Irish hub employee reports anomalous device behavior." const rawTags = [tag1, tag2, tag3] const rawTagColors = ['#1C1C14', '#FF6600', '#AAFF00'] const rawTagTextColors = ['#FFFFFF', '#FFFFFF', '#0A1A00'] const rawStats = [ { value: stat1, label: "Employees" }, { value: stat2, label: "Revenue" }, { value: stat3, label: "Founded" }, ] const filteredTags = useMemo(() => { return rawTags .map((tag, i) => ({ tag, color: rawTagColors[i], textColor: rawTagTextColors[i] })) .filter(item => item.tag !== '' && item.tag !== 'Placeholder') }, []) const filteredStats = useMemo(() => { return rawStats.filter(item => item.value !== '' && item.value !== 'Placeholder' && item.label !== '' && item.label !== 'Placeholder') }, []) const bgOp = interpolate(frame, [0, 18], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const barW = interpolate(frame, [10, 40], [0, 1920], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const panelOp = interpolate(frame, [10, 26], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const panelTy = interpolate(frame, [10, 26], [30, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const nameOp = interpolate(frame, [22, 38], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const nameTy = interpolate(frame, [22, 38], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const divW = interpolate(frame, [32, 55], [0, 1400], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const statsOp = interpolate(frame, [55, 70], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const statsTy = interpolate(frame, [55, 70], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const contextOp = interpolate(frame, [68, 82], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const contextTy = interpolate(frame, [68, 82], [16, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) return (
{titleText}
{label1.charAt(0)}
{label1}
{label2} {label3}
{filteredTags.map((item, i) => { const tagOp = interpolate(frame, [40 + i * 6, 54 + i * 6], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) return (
{item.tag}
) })}
{filteredStats.map((stat, i) => (
{stat.value}
{stat.label}
))}
{contextText}
) } export default AnimationComponent

scenes.script: They didn't see a notification or an incoming call.
scenes.prompt: Close up of a modern smartphone resting on a dark wooden nightstand in a dimly lit bedroom, screen is black and inactive, no notifications or lights, cinematic depth of field, high detail, photorealistic.
scenes.motion: Static shot, subtle ambient light shift.

scenes.script: They saw a factory reset in progress.
Before they were fully awake, it was done.
scenes.prompt: A smartphone screen on a nightstand suddenly goes completely dark, reflecting the dim blue light of a pre-dawn room, sharp focus on the glass surface, cinematic atmosphere.
scenes.motion: Slow dolly out from the phone to reveal the dark room.

scenes.script: The phone: silent.
scenes.prompt: Macro shot of a smartphone lying on a desk, completely dark and silent, no LEDs blinking, high contrast, dark aesthetic.

scenes.script: The laptop in the next room: already dark, its fan winding down to nothing.
scenes.prompt: A high-end laptop on a desk in a dark office, screen is black, faint dust motes visible in the air, cinematic lighting, focus on the cooling vents.
scenes.motion: Slow dolly forward toward the laptop.

scenes.script: Not crashed.
scenes.prompt: Close up of a laptop screen showing a clean black surface, no error messages, no blue screen, just total darkness.

scenes.script: Not frozen.
scenes.prompt: Close up of a laptop keyboard, no lights, no activity, completely unresponsive, cinematic dark lighting.

scenes.script: And simultaneously — across nearly eighty countries, on surgical tablets in Michigan, on administrator consoles in Singapore, on the personal phones of thousands of employees who never thought twice about connecting them to the company network — two hundred thousand devices were wiping themselves.
scenes.reasoning: Visualizing the global scale of the attack.
scenes.code:
import React, { useMemo } from 'react' import { useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, interpolate } from 'remotion' export const AnimationComponent = () => { const frame = useCurrentFrame() const { durationInFrames } = useVideoConfig() const durationSeconds = parseInt("5") || 5 const totalFrames = Math.min(durationSeconds * 30, 600) const rawDots = [ { x: 1180, y: 280, dist: 0.0 }, { x: 1100, y: 300, dist: 0.05 }, { x: 1250, y: 260, dist: 0.08 }, { x: 1050, y: 340, dist: 0.12 }, { x: 1300, y: 320, dist: 0.14 }, { x: 980, y: 280, dist: 0.18 }, { x: 1350, y: 280, dist: 0.20 }, { x: 920, y: 320, dist: 0.24 }, { x: 860, y: 260, dist: 0.28 }, { x: 820, y: 300, dist: 0.30 }, { x: 780, y: 340, dist: 0.34 }, { x: 760, y: 220, dist: 0.36 }, { x: 1380, y: 480, dist: 0.38 }, { x: 720, y: 280, dist: 0.40 }, { x: 680, y: 420, dist: 0.44 }, { x: 640, y: 360, dist: 0.46 }, { x: 600, y: 300, dist: 0.50 }, { x: 560, y: 440, dist: 0.52 }, { x: 520, y: 380, dist: 0.56 }, { x: 480, y: 320, dist: 0.58 }, { x: 440, y: 260, dist: 0.62 }, { x: 400, y: 360, dist: 0.64 }, { x: 360, y: 300, dist: 0.68 }, { x: 320, y: 380, dist: 0.70 }, { x: 280, y: 320, dist: 0.74 }, { x: 240, y: 260, dist: 0.78 }, { x: 200, y: 340, dist: 0.82 }, { x: 820, y: 480, dist: 0.72 }, { x: 760, y: 520, dist: 0.76 }, { x: 700, y: 560, dist: 0.80 }, ] const rawContinents = [ "M 230,230 L 400,210 L 440,290 L 400,400 L 310,440 L 240,400 L 200,310 Z", "M 330,460 L 410,440 L 450,520 L 430,640 L 360,660 L 320,600 L 330,510 Z", "M 710,185 L 840,175 L 860,235 L 820,285 L 740,275 L 705,235 Z", "M 710,305 L 840,295 L 880,425 L 840,565 L 760,585 L 700,505 L 695,385 Z", "M 880,165 L 1180,155 L 1260,205 L 1280,325 L 1180,405 L 980,385 L 860,305 L 850,225 Z", "M 1160,510 L 1280,490 L 1320,570 L 1260,630 L 1160,610 L 1120,550 Z", ] const spreadDots = useMemo(() => rawDots.filter(d => d.x !== 0 || d.y !== 0), []) const continents = useMemo(() => rawContinents.filter(p => p !== '' && p !== 'Placeholder'), []) const phases = { titleStart: 0, titleEnd: totalFrames * 0.15, barEnd: totalFrames * 0.3, mapFadeEnd: totalFrames * 0.35, spreadEnd: totalFrames * 0.8, countEnd: totalFrames * 0.9, labelEnd: totalFrames } const titleOp = interpolate(frame, [phases.titleStart, phases.titleEnd], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const titleTy = interpolate(frame, [phases.titleStart, phases.titleEnd], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const barW = interpolate(frame, [phases.titleStart * 0.5, phases.barEnd], [0, 1920], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const mapOp = interpolate(frame, [phases.titleStart * 0.6, phases.mapFadeEnd], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const spreadProgress = interpolate(frame, [phases.mapFadeEnd * 1.2, phases.spreadEnd], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const countOp = interpolate(frame, [phases.spreadEnd * 0.9, phases.countEnd], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const labelOp = interpolate(frame, [phases.countEnd, phases.labelEnd], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const title = "GLOBAL WIPE EVENT" const originLabel = "IRELAND" const countValue = "200,000" const countLabel = "DEVICES WIPED" const mapLabel1 = "MICHIGAN" const mapLabel2 = "SINGAPORE" const mapX = 100 const mapY = 150 const mapW = 1720 const mapH = 680 const origin = { x: 1180, y: 280 } const visibleCount = Math.floor(spreadProgress * spreadDots.length) const countDisplay = Math.floor(spreadProgress * 30) return (
{title}
{originLabel}
{countDisplay} {countLabel}
{mapLabel1}
{mapLabel2}
) } export default AnimationComponent

scenes.script: A decade of work.
scenes.code:
import React from 'react' import { useCurrentFrame, interpolate } from 'remotion' export const AnimationComponent = () => { const frame = useCurrentFrame() const titleOp = interpolate(frame, [0, 20], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const titleTy = interpolate(frame, [0, 20], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const barW = interpolate(frame, [15, 45], [0, 1920], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) // Count up number const countProgress = interpolate(frame, [20, 80], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const labelOp = interpolate(frame, [25, 40], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const labelTy = interpolate(frame, [25, 40], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const subOp = interpolate(frame, [70, 85], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const subTy = interpolate(frame, [70, 85], [16, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const divW = interpolate(frame, [30, 55], [0, 300], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const accentOp = interpolate(frame, [78, 92], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const title = "DATA LOSS" const countValue = "10" const countLabel = "YEARS OF WORK" const subLabel = "ERASED" const contextText = "Total loss of corporate history." // Parse the count value for animation — default 247 for stub const targetNumber = 247 const currentNumber = Math.floor(countProgress * targetNumber) return (
{/* Title */}
{title}
{/* Count label above number */}
{countLabel}
{/* Divider */}
{/* Animated count number */}
{currentNumber}
{/* Static count value shown after animation */}
{countValue}
{/* Sub label */}
{subLabel}
{/* Context text */}
{contextText}
) } export default AnimationComponent

scenes.script: Plans, correspondence, secrets — disappearing in real time.
scenes.prompt: Abstract visualization of digital files, documents, and folders dissolving into glowing particles and fading into darkness, cinematic, high-tech, dark background.
scenes.motion: Orbit around the dissolving data stream.

scenes.script: No ransom note.
scenes.reasoning: Highlighting the lack of typical ransomware indicators.
scenes.code:
import React from 'react' import { useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, interpolate } from 'remotion' const stat1 = "0" const stat2 = "0" const stat3 = "0" const label1 = "RANSOM NOTES" const label2 = "COUNTDOWN TIMERS" const label3 = "DEMANDS" const sub1 = "FOUND" const sub2 = "FOUND" const sub3 = "FOUND" const verdict = "NON-RANSOMWARE EVENT" export const AnimationComponent = () => { const frame = useCurrentFrame() const op1 = interpolate(frame, [0, 30], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const op2 = interpolate(frame, [35, 65], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const op3 = interpolate(frame, [70, 100], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const opConn1 = interpolate(frame, [63, 78], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const opConn2 = interpolate(frame, [93, 108], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const op4 = interpolate(frame, [115, 140], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const ty4 = interpolate(frame, [115, 140], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) return (
{/* BOX 1 */}
{stat1}
{label1}
{sub1}
{/* CONNECTOR 1 */}
{/* BOX 2 */}
{stat2}
{label2}
{sub2}
{/* CONNECTOR 2 */}
{/* BOX 3 */}
{stat3}
{label3}
{sub3}
{/* VERDICT BOX */}
{verdict}
) } export default AnimationComponent

scenes.script: No countdown timer.
scenes.prompt: A dark, empty digital interface screen, no clocks, no timers, just a blinking cursor in the void, cinematic, dark aesthetic.

scenes.script: Just silence, spreading from device to device across the globe, as if a switch had been thrown somewhere in the dark.
scenes.prompt: A digital map of the world with glowing nodes turning off one by one, spreading from a central point, cinematic, dark background, high-tech.
scenes.motion: Fast zoom out from a single node to the entire globe.

scenes.script: A twenty-five billion dollar company had just been erased.
This is the story of the most surgical corporate cyberattack ever documented.

content.CONTEXT_TEXT: The most precise attack ever documented.

scenes.script: A wiper attack conducted entirely without a wiper.

"DESTRUCTIVE" const rightHead = "REALITY" const rightSub1 = "NO WIPER" const rightSub2 = "NATIVE TOOLS" const rightSub3 = "SURGICAL" const verdict = "ANOMALOUS ATTACK VECTOR" export const extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const tyLS3 = interpolate(frame, [68, 92], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const opRH = interpolate(frame, [100, 125], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const tyRH = interpolate(frame, [100, 125], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const opRS1 = interpolate(frame, [125, 148], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const tyRS1 = interpolate(frame, [125, 148], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const opRS2 = interpolate(frame, [145, 168], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) const tyRS2 = interpolate(frame, [145, 168], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', [205, 230], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp', }) return (

scenes.script: And it begins not with a line of malicious code, but with a stolen key — and a door that should never have opened from the outside.
This story is based on the factual reporting of Krebs on Security.

content.CONTEXT_TEXT: All details based on investigative reporting.

scenes.code:
import React from 'react' import { useCurrentFrame, interpolate } from 'remotion' export const AnimationComponent = () => { const frame = useCurrentFrame() const bgOp = interpolate(frame, [0, 18], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const barW = interpolate(frame, [10, 40], [0, 1920], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const panelOp = interpolate(frame, [12, 28], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const panelTy = interpolate(frame, [12, 28], [30, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const tagOp = interpolate(frame, [22, 36], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const titleOp = interpolate(frame, [28, 44], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const titleTy = interpolate(frame, [28, 44], [20, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const divW = interpolate(frame, [38, 60], [0, 800], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const bodyOp = interpolate(frame, [48, 65], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const bodyTy = interpolate(frame, [48, 65], [16, 0], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const metaOp = interpolate(frame, [62, 78], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const stampOp = interpolate(frame, [72, 88], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const stampScale = interpolate(frame, [72, 88], [1.4, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }) const title = "KREBS ON SECURITY" const label1 = "SOURCE" const label2 = "REPORTING" const label3 = "VERIFIED" const tag1 = "FACTUAL" const tag2 = "DOCUMENTED" const contextText = "All details based on investigative reporting." const alertText = "SOURCE VERIFIED" return (
{/* Top accent */}
{/* Bottom bar */}
{/* Main evidence panel */}
{/* Header bar */}
{title}
{/* Tags row */}
{tag1}
{tag2}
{/* Evidence title */}
{label1}
{/* Divider */}
{/* Body text */}
{contextText}
{/* Meta row */}
{label2} {label3}
{/* Bottom alert bar */}
{alertText}
{/* Stamp — right side */}
{tag1}
) } export default AnimationComponent
